meta.homeDescription: Architectural precision in swimwear. Minimalist forms designed for the sun.

hero.title: The VELÉLS Collection
hero.subtitle: Embracing the stark beauty of contrast. Minimalist forms designed for the sun.

dimaya.name: Dimaya
dimaya.tagline: A daring silhouette crafted with architectural precision. Designed to frame the form with stark, minimalist intent.
dimaya.details: High-cut leg, deep V back, minimal coverage. Handcrafted from premium Italian sustainable techno-fabric.
dimaya.care: Hand wash cold. Dry flat in shade. Do not bleach or tumble dry.

lendai.name: Lendai
lendai.tagline: An asymmetric cut that defies convention. Pure geometry on the body.
lendai.details: Asymmetric shoulder, contour cut. Double-lined for opacity and compression. Italian sustainable fabric.
lendai.care: Hand wash cold. Dry flat in shade. Avoid rough surfaces.

lauri.name: Lauri
lauri.tagline: A two-piece ensemble refined to absolute simplicity. Structure without excess.
lauri.details: Two-piece set. Bandeau top with minimal boning. High-waisted brief with contour cut. Italian ECONYL® fabric.
lauri.care: Hand wash cold. Dry separately. Do not bleach.

ezra.name: Ezra
ezra.tagline: The classic one-piece reimagined through the lens of quiet luxury.
ezra.details: Plunging neckline, high-cut leg. Double-lined for opacity and compression. 78% ECONYL® Regenerated Nylon, 22% Elastane.
ezra.care: Hand wash cold. Dry flat in shade. Avoid rough surfaces to maintain pristine texture.

philosophy.title: The Aesthetic of Silence
philosophy.body: We believe in the power of negative space. Our monochrome vision strips away the superfluous, leaving only precise cuts, premium materials, and an architectural rigor that acts as a sophisticated frame for the wearer.

productDetail.orderMessage: Hi! I'd like to order {product} in size {size}. — via velels.com
